Elaphant 30-Nov-19 05:55 AM
qhelp
VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 30-Nov-19 05:55 AM
List of commands
qHelp - Displays this message qLink email password - Adds your mc account to VoQueue (THIS IS A DIRECT MESSAGE ONLY COMMAND!) qDel username - removes your account from voqueue qJoin username - Starts queuing your account qDC username - Stops queuing your account qSee [username] - Checks your account's queue/in-game status (leaving username empty will list all your linked accounts) qSettings username - change account specific settings (AutoEat, AutoDisconnect, etc) qRequeue username - requeues your account (equivalent of /queue main) qShareList accountUsername - shows a list of minecraft accounts that have access to your voqueue account qShare accountUsername username - gives voqueue account access to another minecraft account qUnShare accountUsername username - removes voqueue account access from another minecraft account qInfo - Displays 2b2t's queue status qExecHelp - list of executive only commands
VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 30-Nov-19 11:30 AM

You can't use that command here.

VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 30-Nov-19 12:35 PM
List of commands
qHelp - Displays this message qLink email password - Adds your mc account to VoQueue (THIS IS A DIRECT MESSAGE ONLY COMMAND!) qDel username - removes your account from voqueue qJoin username - Starts queuing your account qDC username - Stops queuing your account qSee [username] - Checks your account's queue/in-game status (leaving username empty will list all your linked accounts) qSettings username - change account specific settings (AutoEat, AutoDisconnect, etc) qCopySettings username username - copy account settings from first account to the other qRequeue username - requeues your account (equivalent of /queue main) qShareList accountUsername - shows a list of minecraft accounts that have access to your voqueue account qShare accountUsername username - gives voqueue account access to another minecraft account qUnShare accountUsername username - removes voqueue account access from another minecraft account qInfo - Displays 2b2t's queue status qExecHelp - list of executive only commands

Elaphant 01-Dec-19 07:44 AM

Pork 01-Dec-19 07:44 AM

Elaphant 01-Dec-19 07:44 AM
ye thats fine
Pork 01-Dec-19 07:44 AM
(minutes)
Elaphant 01-Dec-19 07:44 AM
thats litty
Pork 01-Dec-19 07:44 AM
Fyi
My preferred settings right now
Turn on all notifications, turn on auto eat, turn on all antiafk settings and set delay to 42, turn on anti hunger
Disable auto disconnect if you're afking in spawn
Btw
When antiafking, do it preferably not in spawn, in at least 4x4 room with 2 high walls
Preferably 6x6
Also to connect to it
Just connect directly to q.joinvo.co
It will immediately stop all voqueue functions and let you play normally
Also once you finish queue once, and setup a proper antiafk location, you should have instant-no queue access to 2b 24/7

am just messing around with it atm

coltsnid 03-Dec-19 06:12 PM
qexechelp
VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 03-Dec-19 06:12 PM
List of commands
qExecHelp - Displays this message qExecRegister @mention - Gives the user permission to use VoQueue (gives the user the VoQueue Access role and gives it one voqueue account slot) qExecDeregister @mention - Removes the user's permission to use VoQueue (removes the VoQueue Access role from the user and deletes all of it's accounts) qExecSlots @mention slotAmount - Set's a user's slot amount (Users start with 1 slot, every purchase gives them one extra slot for one extra account), leave slotAmount empty to see the user's current slots count qExecList - Lists all VoQueue accounts qExecSee @mention mcUsername - Checks a specific user's account VoQueue status qExecKick @mention mcUsername - Kicks account from 2b2t and stops queuing it qExecDel @mention mcUsername - stops account, and deletes it from VoQueue databases qExecStatus - Displays VoQueue's server status

Notifications:
Discord notifications for various events Finish queue: Notifies when your account finishes the queue Time before finishing queue: Notifies when your account finishes the queue in the chosen amount of minutes Direct message: Notifies when your account receives a direct message Player alarm: Notifies when a player enters your render distance Damage Taken: Notifies when your account takes damage Death: Notifies when your account dies Disconnect: Notifies when your account gets kicked from 2b2t

VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 25-Dec-19 05:34 AM
List of commands
qHelp - Displays this message qLink - Adds your mc account to VoQueue, run for explanation qDel <VoQueue Account> - removes your account from voqueue qJoin <VoQueue Account> - Starts queuing your account qDC <VoQueue Account> - Stops queuing your account qSee [VoQueue Account] - Checks your account's queue/in-game status (leaving username empty will list all your linked accounts) qSettings <VoQueue Account> - change account specific settings (AutoEat, AutoDisconnect, etc) qCopySettings <VoQueue Account> <VoQueue Account> - copy account settings from first account to the other qRequeue <VoQueue Account> - requeues your account (equivalent of /queue main) qShareList <VoQueue Account> - shows a list of minecraft accounts that have access to your voqueue account qShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - gives voqueue account access to another minecraft account qUnShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - removes voqueue account access from another minecraft account qIgnore <VoQueue Account> <Minecraft Username> - Makes the account use the /ignore command on that user, useful for Direct Messages qInfo - Displays 2b2t's queue status qExecHelp - list of executive only commands
<required argument> [optional argument] VoQueue Accounts can be referenced by their IGN or slot number

VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 25-Dec-19 05:39 AM
List of commands
qHelp - Displays this message qLink - Adds your mc account to VoQueue, run for explanation qDel <VoQueue Account> - removes your account from voqueue qJoin <VoQueue Account> - Starts queuing your account qDC <VoQueue Account> - Stops queuing your account qSee [VoQueue Account] - Checks your account's queue/in-game status (leaving username empty will list all your linked accounts) qSettings <VoQueue Account> - change account specific settings (AutoEat, AutoDisconnect, etc) qCopySettings <VoQueue Account> <VoQueue Account> - copy account settings from first account to the other qRequeue <VoQueue Account> - requeues your account (equivalent of /queue main) qShareList <VoQueue Account> - shows a list of minecraft accounts that have access to your voqueue account qShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - gives voqueue account access to another minecraft account qUnShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - removes voqueue account access from another minecraft account qIgnore <VoQueue Account> <Minecraft Username> - Makes the account use the /ignore command on that user, useful for Direct Messages qHistory <VoQueue Account> - displays a list of Minecraft accounts that connected to your VoQueue account qInfo - Displays 2b2t's queue status qExecHelp - list of executive only commands
<required argument> [optional argument] VoQueue Accounts can be referenced by their IGN or slot number
Pork 25-Dec-19 05:39 AM
qExecHistory
VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 25-Dec-19 05:39 AM
Error
You didn't provide any arguments The proper usage would be: qexechistory <@mention#0001> <VoQueue Account>
Pork 25-Dec-19 05:40 AM
qExecHelp
VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 25-Dec-19 05:40 AM
List of commands
qExecHelp - Displays this message qExecRegister <@mention#0001> - Gives the user permission to use VoQueue (gives the user the VoQueue Access role and gives it one voqueue account slot) qExecDeregister <@mention#0001> - Removes the user's permission to use VoQueue (removes the VoQueue Access role from the user and deletes all of it's accounts) qExecSlots <@mention#0001> [Slots] - Set's a user's slot amount (Users start with 1 slot, every purchase gives them one extra slot for one extra account), leave slots empty to see the user's current slots count qExecList - Lists all VoQueue accounts qExecSee <@mention#0001> <VoQueue Account> - Checks a specific user's account VoQueue status qExecKick <@mention#0001> <VoQueue Account> - Kicks account from 2b2t and stops queuing it qExecDel <@mention#0001> <VoQueue Account> - stops account, and deletes it from VoQueue databases qExecHistory <@mention#0001> <VoQueue Account> - displays a list of Minecraft accounts that connected to the VoQueue account qExecStatus - Displays VoQueue's server status
<required argument> [optional argument] VoQueue Accounts can be referenced by their IGN or slot number

VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 25-Dec-19 11:00 AM
List of commands
qHelp - Displays this message qLink - Adds your mc account to VoQueue, run for explanation qDel <VoQueue Account> - removes your account from voqueue qJoin <VoQueue Account> - Starts queuing your account qDC <VoQueue Account> - Stops queuing your account qSee [VoQueue Account] - Checks your account's queue/in-game status (leaving username empty will list all your linked accounts) qSettings <VoQueue Account> - change account specific settings (AutoEat, AutoDisconnect, etc) qCopySettings <VoQueue Account> <VoQueue Account> - copy account settings from first account to the other qRequeue <VoQueue Account> - requeues your account (equivalent of /queue main) qShareList <VoQueue Account> - shows a list of minecraft accounts that have access to your voqueue account qShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - gives voqueue account access to another minecraft account qUnShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - removes voqueue account access from another minecraft account qIgnore <VoQueue Account> <Minecraft Username> - Makes the account use the /ignore command on that user, useful for Direct Messages qHistory <VoQueue Account> - displays a list of Minecraft accounts that connected to your VoQueue account qInfo - Displays 2b2t's queue status qExecHelp - list of executive only commands
<required argument> [optional argument] VoQueue Accounts can be referenced by their IGN or slot number

VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 03-Jan-20 01:30 AM
List of commands
qHelp - Displays this message qLink - Adds your mc account to VoQueue, run for explanation qDel <VoQueue Account> - removes your account from voqueue qJoin <VoQueue Account> - Starts queuing your account qDC <VoQueue Account> - Stops queuing your account qSee [VoQueue Account] - Checks your account's queue/in-game status (leaving username empty will list all your linked accounts) qSettings <VoQueue Account> - change account specific settings (AutoEat, AutoDisconnect, etc) qCopySettings <VoQueue Account> <VoQueue Account> - copy account settings from first account to the other qResetSettings <VoQueue Account> - reset account settings qRequeue <VoQueue Account> - requeues your account (equivalent of /queue main) qShareList <VoQueue Account> - shows a list of minecraft accounts that have access to your voqueue account qShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - gives voqueue account access to another minecraft account qUnShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - removes voqueue account access from another minecraft account qIgnore <VoQueue Account> <Minecraft Username> - Makes the account use the /ignore command on that user, useful for Direct Messages qHistory <VoQueue Account> - displays a list of Minecraft accounts that connected to your VoQueue account qChat <VoQueue Account> - Allows you to speak on VoChat via your chosen VoQueue Account qInfo - Displays 2b2t's queue status qUserStats <Minecraft Account> - Displays 2b2t player stats qExecHelp - list of executive only commands
<required argument> [optional argument] VoQueue Accounts can be referenced by their IGN or slot number

qHelp - Displays this message qLink - Adds your mc account to VoQueue, run for explanation qDel <VoQueue Account> - removes your account from voqueue qJoin <VoQueue Account> - Starts queuing your account qDC <VoQueue Account> - Stops queuing your account qSee [VoQueue Account] - Checks your account's queue/in-game status (leaving username empty will list all your linked accounts) qSettings <VoQueue Account> - change account specific settings (AutoEat, AutoDisconnect, etc) qCopySettings <VoQueue Account> <VoQueue Account> - copy account settings from first account to the other qResetSettings <VoQueue Account> - reset account settings qRequeue <VoQueue Account> - requeues your account (equivalent of /queue main) qShareList <VoQueue Account> - shows a list of minecraft accounts that have access to your voqueue account qShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - gives voqueue account access to another minecraft account qUnShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - removes voqueue account access from another minecraft account qIgnore <VoQueue Account> <Minecraft Username> - Makes the account use the /ignore command on that user, useful for Direct Messages qHistory <VoQueue Account> - displays a list of Minecraft accounts that connected to your VoQueue account qChat <VoQueue Account> - Allows you to speak on VoChat via your chosen VoQueue Account qInfo - Displays 2b2t's queue status qUserStats <Minecraft Account> - Displays 2b2t player stats qExecHelp - list of executive only commands
<required argument> [optional argument] VoQueue Accounts can be referenced by their IGN or slot number

Notifications:
Discord notifications for various events Finish queue: Notifies when your account finishes the queue Time before finishing queue: Notifies when your account finishes the queue in the chosen amount of minutes Direct message: Notifies when your account receives a direct message Player alarm: Notifies when a player enters your render distance Damage Taken: Notifies when your account takes damage Out Of Food: Notifies when your account is hungry, has AutoEat turned on and is out of food Death: Notifies when your account dies Disconnect: Notifies when your account gets kicked from 2b2t

coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:27 AM
@Pork this account that i tried to join on the test server is stuck connecting (edited)
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:28 AM
logs say it was auto disconnected because of your player alarm
its just reconnecting now
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:29 AM
ah alright, i just assumed it was the stuck connecting bug since that happens quite often
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:29 AM
(you should turn off your player alarm if you dont want that to happen again)
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:29 AM
yes doing that now
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:29 AM
"since that happens quite often" what? i fixed that a week ago
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:30 AM
the one where it indefinitely says "x is connecting to 2b2t..."?
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:30 AM
yes?
that was fixed when we moved to the new autoreconnect system
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:31 AM
when was that?
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:31 AM
dont remember exactly, i can lookup the commit if youd like
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:31 AM
the one we discussed due to the lockout? or the one from a while back because accounts weren't getting in on restarts?
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:32 AM
restarts
also
just noticed, currently its set to not reconnect you after a playeralarm
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:32 AM
that was a while back, i feel like i've seen the stuck connecting bug since then, but i'll keep an eye out
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:32 AM
ah
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:33 AM
so now it is stuck connecting?
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:33 AM
looks like when you get kicked for player alarm it doesnt reconnect but doesnt remove you from the slave server
so its not doing anything but it does say youre connecting
rememeber that? https://discordapp.com/channels/466714928443817994/471326494379999243/674878216636334081
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:33 AM
that will be confusing so that needs to be tidied up
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:33 AM
i was right, just not for the root cause (edited)
its not confusing behaviour, its just a bug
lets decide now, do we want it to reconnect or not? (edited)
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:34 AM
in which scenario?
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:34 AM
disconnected due to player alarm
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:35 AM
i'd say yes, since normally you'd have time to wait through queue
but i don't know
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:35 AM
also if were here, should we reconnect or not when hp is too low
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:35 AM
that's a good question
it might call for a setting in the AutoQueue submodule "DisableOnAutoDC"
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:35 AM
thats not autoqueue
i remind you there are 2 seperate autoqueue systems (edited)
master autoqueue
and per slave independent autoqueue
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:36 AM
again, confusing
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:36 AM
master autoqueue is when whole of 2b2t or a slave server goes down
which only master can know, not the slave itself
slave autoqueue is for everything else
nothing i can do about that, its confusing behaviour that comes with the problem of us technically having several voqueues running all at the same time with one server controlling them (edited)
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:37 AM
idk
either way is fine
probably disable
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:38 AM
hmm i guess
but i think people will get the notification and want to queue back in to solve it themselves
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:38 AM
if the account is autoDCed because low health/crystal/player turn off requeue
you know we could name the systems differently to help the confusion
there's not nothing we could do
how about AutoQueue and ReQueue
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:39 AM
i think the problem is autoqueue is what we all assume is slave queue
and master queue has an entirely different purpose
it should be renamed
and slave queue should be called autoqueue
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:39 AM
yeah tbh i don't understand how it works at all
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:40 AM
"AutoQueue" (from the user side anyways) only handles server restarts
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:40 AM
i thought it was just regular autoqueue for everything, and then a system that requeues all accounts on a restart
yeah that is massively confusing
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:41 AM
ill leave it up to you to come up with better names, im gonna actually do the code for that now
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:42 AM
i still don't understand the system so i can't effectively name the parts
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:42 AM
ill draw it
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:42 AM
but just use AutoQueue for whichever is the system that players use, and ReQueue for the server-side one

VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 17-Feb-20 08:50 PM
List of commands
qHelp - Displays this message qLink - Adds your mc account to VoQueue, run for explanation qDel <VoQueue Account> - removes your account from voqueue qJoin <VoQueue Account> - Starts queuing your account qDC <VoQueue Account> - Stops queuing your account qSee [VoQueue Account] - Checks your account's queue/in-game status (leaving username empty will list all your linked accounts) qSettings <VoQueue Account> - change account specific settings (AutoEat, AutoDisconnect, etc) qCopySettings <VoQueue Account> <VoQueue Account> - copy account settings from first account to the other qResetSettings <VoQueue Account> - reset account settings qRequeue <VoQueue Account> - requeues your account (equivalent of /queue main) qShareList <VoQueue Account> - shows a list of minecraft accounts that have access to your voqueue account qShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - gives voqueue account access to another minecraft account qUnShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - removes voqueue account access from another minecraft account qIgnore <VoQueue Account> <Minecraft Username> - Makes the account use the /ignore command on that user, useful for Direct Messages qDM <VoQueue Account> <Minecraft Username> <Message> - Sends a direct message on 2b2t qHistory <VoQueue Account> - displays a list of Minecraft accounts that connected to your VoQueue account qChat <VoQueue Account> - Allows you to speak on VoChat via your chosen VoQueue Account qInfo - Displays 2b2t's queue status qUserStats <Minecraft Account> - Displays 2b2t player stats qCheck <Minecraft Account> - Checks if a minecraft account is currently on 2b2t qExecHelp - list of executive only commands
<required argument> [optional argument] VoQueue Accounts can be referenced by their IGN or slot number

VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 25-Feb-20 01:51 AM
(edited)
Notifications:
Discord notifications for various events Finish queue: Notifies when your account has finished queue Time before finishing queue: Notifies when your account will finish queue in the chosen amount of minutes Direct message: Notifies when your account receives a direct message Player alarm: Notifies when a player enters your render distance Damage Taken: Notifies when your account takes damage Out Of Food: Notifies when your account has no food, if AutoEat is enabled Death: Notifies when your account dies Disconnect: Notifies when your account gets kicked from 2b2t Stuck: Notifies when your account cannot move, if AntiAFK Walk mode is enabled

List of commands
qHelp - Displays this message qLink - Adds your mc account to VoQueue, run for explanation qDel <VoQueue Account> - removes your account from voqueue qJoin <VoQueue Account> - Starts queuing your account qDC <VoQueue Account> - Stops queuing your account qSee [VoQueue Account] - Checks your account's queue/in-game status (leaving username empty will list all your linked accounts) qSettings <VoQueue Account> - change account specific settings (AutoEat, AutoDisconnect, etc) qCopySettings <VoQueue Account> <VoQueue Account> - copy account settings from first account to the other qResetSettings <VoQueue Account> - reset account settings qRequeue <VoQueue Account> - requeues your account (equivalent of /queue main) qShareList <VoQueue Account> - shows a list of minecraft accounts that have access to your voqueue account qShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - gives voqueue account access to another minecraft account qUnShare <VoQueue Account> <Shared Account> - removes voqueue account access from another minecraft account qIgnore <VoQueue Account> <Minecraft Username> - Makes the account use the /ignore command on that user, useful for Direct Messages qDM <VoQueue Account> <Minecraft Username> <Message> - Sends a direct message on 2b2t qHistory <VoQueue Account> - displays a list of Minecraft accounts that connected to your VoQueue account qChat <VoQueue Account> - Allows you to speak on VoChat via your chosen VoQueue Account qInfo - Displays 2b2t's queue status qUserStats <Minecraft Account> - Displays 2b2t player stats qCheck <Minecraft Account> - Checks if a minecraft account is currently on 2b2t qExecHelp - list of executive only commands
<required argument> [optional argument] VoQueue Accounts can be referenced by their IGN or slot number
